- Uses `-O` to save the file with its original name (`command.txt`)
- Downloads from the OwnCloud WebDAV endpoint at `http://the-agent-company.com:8092`

The file `command.txt` would be saved to the current working directory. The script has been saved to `/tmp/download.sh`.
